pi_items.source: Task specification matches setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Task specification matches setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Task specification matches setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Executed ground truth SQL query against actual chinook.db file; all columns present and correctly calculated
Executed ground truth SQL query with LIMIT 20; verified 20 rows returned with correct Jaccard similarity ordering (descending) and correct shared artist counts

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database from GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database) containing 59 customers, 275 artists, and real iTunes music store data. The task requires computing Jaccard similarity between customer pairs based on shared artist purchases. The ground truth query correctly calculates SharedArtists as the count of artists both customers purchased, TotalArtists as the union of their artist sets, and JaccardSimilarity as SharedArtists/TotalArtists rounded to 4 decimal places. The top customer pair (IDs 9 and 29) has 11 shared artists out of 18 total unique artists for a Jaccard similarity of 0.6111. The task correctly specifies 20 expected rows and all 7 required output columns.
